## Description

A clear and concise description of what this PR changes and why.

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactor (internal code improvement with no behavioral change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Tooling / CI improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run ci` passes locally (lint + type-check + test + build)
- [ ] New or updated tests cover the changed behavior
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` with a summary of changes
- [ ] Documentation updated if public API or protocol changed
- [ ] No new ESLint warnings introduced (run `npm run lint`)
- [ ] PR targets `main` (or a `release/vX.Y.Z` branch for release PRs)
